race.comment: MONTY ZOOMER (1) was building toward his last start win where he was just too good from the front, scoring by 1.4L with Li on board. The form out of that has already been franked and this looks to set up similarly. Back to 1400m now but he'll give them something to chase. MILITARY ACTION (7) stuck on well over further last start but is better placed coming back to this trip today. He can land in a midfield position for Cooper and if he can bring his best form, he'll be hard to hold out. SECRICITY (2) flew home here first-up after getting well back. She draws much better today and can take closer order with the fresh run under her belt. Derrick knows her well and she can go a couple better today without surprising. DUBLIN RED (4) can feature in the finish following a strong win last start. IDEALLY (6) can build on the first-up effort with Fiore now on board.
